enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps May 9-10 in his Boulder living vlog, describing getting high frequently on weed from his roommate, spending Mother's Day at his mom's house with family for a barbecue, and planning to stay in due to unexpected late-May snow. He mentions plans to read his motorcycle owners manual and motorbike handbook, explore Colorado riding routes on Google Earth, and film some request videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

causes him to get tired and crash

transcript.text: Living in Boulder V-Log for the 9th and 10th.
I didn't do my V-Log yesterday.
Whoops, my bad.
I guess I need to stay more on top of things.
I've been really high lately.
My roommate's been giving me a bunch of weed every day.
He goes and buys weed, gives me a different kind.
I'm mixing the strains and getting really high.
Anyway, yesterday I didn't have time to look at my manual.
I've got my owner's manual here.
I'm going to read through that.
Then I have to read through the motorbike handbook.
I'll do that today.
Yesterday I was on Google Earth just coming up with all these cool routes to do in Colorado.
So, there's lots of cool routes to do where you're going over a lot of really high mountain passes.
So, oh yeah, and then I went over to my mom's house.
Because Mother's Day is today and we did the Mother's Day thing yesterday.
I had the meal and barbecue.
I had a big old slab of beef that my brother made.
And then I like passed out, man.
He's like, oh, you have the itis?
Yeah, people get tired when they eat beef.
So, it was good.
But yeah, I came home and crashed.
And then I was working.
But I had a couple of beers.
So, I lost my ability to work really well.
Oh, look.
My little guy's hungry.
When my gecko is hungry, he does that.
He looks over there.
Because that's where the crickets a lot of the time come from.
They hide in the corner there.
So, he comes and looks and sees as they come out.
So, today I'll read through those and get prepared.
And then I was going to ride today, but take the bike out today.
But look, it's freaking snowing.
It's like almost June.
No, no.
It's May.
May 11th.
Halfway through May.
It's snowing.
So, yeah.
I guess that's what I was doing today.
All right.
I want to do some request videos.
Okay.
Peace out.
